title: STIM Shot
description: Adds new stim shots the game that give great buffs!
body:
# STIM Shots
This mod adds a bunch of Shots that give effects and buffs. They are extremly powerful but it the cost of being exspensive. More Shots will be added over time but at the moment, the mod is in beta.


<details>
<summary>STIM Shots</summary>

## Diamond
***Supersonic Shot***
* Increases Speed Majorly & is Given Invisibility
***Stability Shot***
* Stabilizes the Players Health & Hunger
***Bloodlust***
* Gives a Boost of Insane Strength and Speed.
## Gold
***Adrenaline Shot***
* Increases Movement and Attack Speed
* Takes Less Damage

***Regenerative Shot***
* Gains a Huge Health Boost

***Endurance Shot***
* Gives Players Extra Temporary Health
* Player Takes a Lot Less Damage

## Iron
***Excavator Shot***
* Increases Mining Speed
* Decreases Player Damage

***Eruption Shot***
- Insane Jump Boost
- Players are Given Fire Resistance

</details>
